regions.label: Top toolbar
regions.description: Site title, undo/redo, preview, share, settings, more, publish

regions.label: Page header section
regions.description: Hero banner with site name, page title, header image controls

regions.label: Page body
regions.description: Main content area where sections and elements are placed

regions.label: Insert panel
regions.description: Text box, Images, Embed, Drive, content blocks, collapsible group, TOC, carousel, button, divider, spacer, social links, placeholder, YouTube, calendar, map

regions.label: Pages panel
regions.description: Page tree with filter, add page button

regions.label: Themes panel
regions.description: Theme selector (Simple, Aristotle, Diplomat, Vision...), color swatches, font style dropdown, custom theme creation

regions.label: Settings modal
regions.description: Navigation (mode, color), Brand images, Viewer tools, Custom domains, Analytics, Announcement banner

explorations.result: Reveals rich text toolbar: style (Title), font (Lato-Light), size (64), B/I/U, text color, link, emoji, alignment, duplicate, delete, more. Also shows Image dropdown and Header type at bottom of header section.

Inserts an empty text box in the body with cursor. Toolbar shows: Normal text style, font (Lato), size (11), B/I/U, color, link, emoji, alignment, ordered list, unordered list, duplicate, delete, more.
Text appears in the text box. Confirmed in Preview mode.
Opens 'Insert button' dialog with Name (0/120 chars), Link fields, Cancel/Insert buttons.
Opens 'Embed from the web' dialog with two tabs: 'By URL' (URL input) and 'Embed code', plus Cancel/Insert buttons.
Enters Preview mode showing rendered site. Bottom bar has device toggles (phone/tablet/desktop), report button, close (X). Back arrow exits preview.
Shows page tree with Home page. Filter pages input at top. + button at bottom for new pages.
Opens 'New page' popover with Name field, Advanced dropdown, Done button.

Shows CUSTOM section (create/upload), CREATED BY GOOGLE section with themes (Simple selected, Aristotle, Diplomat, Vision...), color swatches (blue/pink/green/purple/dark/black/custom), font style dropdown.
Opens Settings modal with sections: Navigation (Mode: Top dropdown, Color: Transparent dropdown), Brand images, Viewer tools, Custom domains, Analytics, Announcement banner.
